/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Werror -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.9.0 -o libcpr.1.9.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libcpr.1.dylib CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/accept_encoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/async.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/bearer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/callback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/cert_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/cookies.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/cprtypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/curl_container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/curlholder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/multipart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/parameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/payload.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/proxies.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/proxyauth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/threadpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/timeout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/unix_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/redirect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/interceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/ssl_ctx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/curlmultiholder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpr.dir/multiperform.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ivan/CLionProjects/CurrencyCalculator/build/_deps/curl-build/lib ../../curl-build/lib/libcurl.dylib -framework SystemConfiguration -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssh2.dylib
